title: Vorian Four
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Vorian Four |region=*[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] that fall in grid square K-8 in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]]. |sector=[[Immalia sector/Legends|Immalia sector]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |system=[[Vorian system/Legends|Vorian system]] |coordinates=K-8 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|A Hutt's home is where his business interests lie.''"
"''Even the members of the Trade Federation are not so mercenary.''"
"''Fine words, coming from the one whose organization covered up the niobarium pollution on Vorian Four.|[[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin]] and [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]]|}} '''Vorian Four''' was a terrestrial astronomical object located within the [[Vorian system/Legends|Vorian system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was polluted with [[niobarium]] by the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]], but the incident was covered up by [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Vorian IV }} [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Expansion Region]] [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Northern Dependencies]] [[Category:Immalia sector locations]] [[Category:Terrestrial astronomical objects]]
